# App & Monetization Ideas

## Acquisition (Bring People In)

**Cost of Living Calculator**
- "Can I afford to live in Medellin on $2,000/month?" — interactive slider with rent, food, transport, coworking breakdowns. Highly SEO-searchable and shareable. Links naturally to Wise for sending money.

**City Comparison Tool**
- Side-by-side comparison of 2–3 cities across cost, climate, internet, safety, vibe. "Medellin vs Buenos Aires vs Mexico City" — great for SEO long-tail queries.

**"Find Your City" Quiz**
- Answer 5–6 questions (budget, climate preference, language comfort, pace of life, visa type) and get a matched city. Very shareable/viral.

**Visa & Entry Info per City/Country**
- Visa-free days, popular visa runs, tourist → residency paths. Rarely aggregated well for LATAM. Massive SEO opportunity.

---

## Retention (Keep People Coming Back)

**Monthly City Updates**
- "What changed this month" — new coworking spots, Airbnb price shifts, safety notes. Gives a reason to return.

**Saved Cities / Trip Planner**
- Let users bookmark cities and build a loose itinerary. Requires accounts = email list growth.

**Community Ratings / Tips**
- Short user-submitted tips (1–2 sentences) per city section (airport, neighborhoods, cafes). Low-friction UGC keeps content fresh without heavy moderation.

**"Currently Good For" Tags**
- Dynamic seasonality indicators: "Dry season now", "Festival month", "Avoid — rainy peak". Updates monthly.

**Nomad Cost Index**
- Monthly updated snapshot of Airbnb, coworking, and grocery prices per city (even if estimates). Could tie into affiliate links for booking platforms.

---

## Monetization Alignment

| Feature | Monetization |
|---|---|
| Cost calculator | Wise affiliate (send money abroad) |
| Visa info | Travel insurance affiliates |
| City comparison | Flight/hotel affiliate links |
| Saved cities | Account creation → email marketing |
| Airbnb price data | Airbnb affiliate |
| Coworking listings | Coworking affiliate/sponsorship |
